MAP 8 · Leadership Programme

Unlock Up to
4X Transition
Packages

Tailored to Your Current Income & Experience.

Built for consultants who know their worth — and want more.

Limited openings · No obligation · Private & Confidential

What makes MAP 8 different

A framework designed for serious advisers.

Competitive

Targets designed to be achievable

MAP 8 sets realistic milestones based on your track record. Your goals are calibrated to what you have already proven you can do — not arbitrary benchmarks.

Simplified

Admin and catch-up handled automatically

Excess production in any year covers shortfalls from prior years. No appeals. No lost years. The system works for you — not against you.

Pay for Performance

Your track record determines your reward

Whether or not you have production certificates, you qualify. Both paths offer the same framework — no disadvantage for advisers without MDRT certificates.

New in MAP 8

The Year 7 Bonus Extension.

Outperform your targets and automatically unlock an additional year of production bonus. No extra obligations. No additional commitment. Pure reward for excellence — built into the structure.

Your Journey

1

Year 1

Onboarding & Production begins

2

Year 2–5

Validation period & milestone checks

3

Year 6

Full validation complete

4

Year 7

Bonus extension (outperformers)

Who is MAP 8 for?

Career Switcher

Mid-Career Professionals

Lawyers, bankers, doctors exploring FA as a strategic second career. Your professional network and credibility are your greatest assets.

Existing FA

Experienced Consultants

Already proven in financial advisory and looking for a stronger platform, better support, and a structure that rewards what you've built.

New Entrant

Ambitious Fresh Starters

Strong networks, a drive to build, and the right mindset. The platform is ready — we just need the right people to grow with.

Simple process

How it works

›
01

Submit your background

Share your income range, experience, and current role. Takes 2 minutes. Completely confidential.

›
02

Director reviews your profile

Our director personally reviews every application and prepares a tailored proposal based on your history.

›
03

Private meeting

We walk you through the full structure in a 1-on-1 conversation. No pressure, no audience, no obligation.

04

You decide

Take your time. Ask questions. We're building a team, not closing a sale.

Check Eligibility

Check Your Eligibility

Submit your details. Our director prepares a personalised proposal within 24 hours.

+65

Limited openings · No obligation · Private & Confidential

All compensation structures are indicative, personalised, and subject to eligibility criteria. This page is intended for qualified financial advisory professionals in Singapore only.
